allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/status" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - OK" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Home page: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Home: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/status" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "API: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "API: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/status" -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "OK - $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty updated } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/status' -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { "Server not running or error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/status' -TimeoutSec 20 -ErrorAction Stop; $r.services | Where-Object { $_.name -eq 'Vapi' } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { "Error: $_" })
